overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking and running through urban Los Santos streets, crossing multiple intersections, and reaching a sunny beachside waterfront area with palm trees and a marina.

events.description: white delivery truck with 'Good Aids' branding drives past on the left
character transitions from walking to jogging as approaching intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the Asian restaurant, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: white box truck with green and red 'Good Aids' logo driving along the street

entered.detail: single-story building with cream stucco walls, red trim, and pagoda-style roof edges
white delivery truck with distinctive green and red 'Good Aids' branding on the side
tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the street
modern curved street lamp posts along the roadway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beside an Asian-style restaurant with distinctive red trim. A white 'Good Aids' delivery truck passes by on the left. Palm trees and street lights line the road as the character approaches an intersection.

events.description: character crosses the asphalt intersection, navigating around vehicles
moving from commercial building area to tree-lined sidewalk with grassy median

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and continuing along the sidewalk past the yield sign

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking on the opposite side of the street

entered.detail: red and white triangular yield sign mounted on a metal pole
overhead traffic signal gantry with multiple lights

segments.scene_description: The character crosses an open intersection marked by a prominent yield sign. The Asian restaurant recedes behind as the scene transitions to a tree-lined sidewalk with a grassy median. Traffic lights and distant pedestrians are visible.

events.description: character crosses brick-paved crosswalk near parked white truck
white box truck temporarily blocks the view as character passes closely

agents.ego_description: navigating across the street and around parked vehicles at the corner

notable_agents.action: cream-colored box truck parked at the intersection corner
black convertible driving through the intersection

entered.detail: cream-colored delivery truck parked at the street corner
mature leafy trees with dense canopies shading the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a brick-paved intersection, passing a parked white box truck and a black convertible. Large mature trees line the sidewalk, providing shade. The environment transitions toward a more vegetated beach approach area.

events.description: character breaks into a full sprint along the beachside path
approaching waterfront marina with boats and modern apartment towers visible

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the beachside promenade past other pedestrians and toward the waterfront

notable_agents.action: NPC pedestrian in red shirt running along the path in the same direction
group of pedestrians walking near the waterfront railing

entered.detail: sandy beach and ocean water visible beyond the concrete promenade
boat docks and piers extending into the water with small vessels
tall curved glass and concrete residential towers overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a sunny beachside promenade lined with palm trees. Other pedestrians are visible walking and running along the path. The scene opens up to reveal a marina with docked boats, a sandy beach, and modern curved apartment towers overlooking the ocean.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling urban street that gradually opens into a bright, expansive beachside waterfront. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside an Asian-style restaurant with red trim as a white delivery truck passes by, moving steadily toward a city intersection. As the character crosses the road past a yield sign, the urban architecture recedes and the scene shifts toward a tree-lined sidewalk with a grassy median. The camera then glides across a brick-paved intersection past parked vehicles and shaded walkways, transitioning the environment from city streets to a more vegetated coastal approach. Finally, the scene opens up as the character runs along a sunny promenade lined with palm trees, revealing a marina with docked boats and modern apartment towers overlooking the ocean.
